channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Runnin' Utes trounce Arizona State, 99-73
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - Ezra Ausar scored 25 points and Utah put up 58 points in the second half to pull away from Arizona State to earn its first win under interim coach Josh Eilert, 99-73 on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Bay Area high school soccer playoffs: Top storylines from Saturday’s NCS, CCS title games
item.description: Monte Vista wins NCS Division I title as a 10th seed. Homestead, Menlo, SHP girls, Milpitas boys win CCS crowns.
item.dc:creator: Mike Lefkow, Correspondent, The Mercury News

item.title: USC's JuJu Watkins hangs 30 points on UCLA at historic Pauley Pavilion
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — JuJu Watkins came into the house that Alcindor, Walton and Wooden built and put on a show. The stellar sophomore had 30 points, five assists, three blocks and two steals in a game-high 37 minutes and No. 4 Southern California beat No.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: JuJu Watkins scores 30, No. 4 USC defeats No. 2 UCLA 80-67 to win 1st Big Ten regular-season title
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — JuJu Watkins scored 30 points and No. 4 Southern California defeated second-ranked UCLA 80-67 on Saturday night to clinch the program's first Big Ten regular-season title in its league debut. The crosstown rivals came into the sold-out game at Pauley Pavilion tied for first.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Cooper Flagg returns for 2nd half after leaving No. 2 Duke’s victory with eye injury
item.description: DURHAM, N.C. (AP) — Duke players see star freshman Cooper Flagg’s toughness on a regular basis and that was on display for everyone else Saturday night. Flagg returned for the second half of the No.
item.dc:creator: BOB SUTTON, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Avalanche land Lindgren, Wild get Nyquist and Panthers acquire Seth Jones in busy day of NHL trades
item.description: Defensemen Seth Jones and Ryan Lindgren and forward Gustav Nyquist were on the move on Saturday as three Central Division teams got a jump on the NHL’s looming trade deadline.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: No. 7 St. John's clinches first Big East regular-season title in 40 years and eyes more celebrations
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The final horn sounded and St. John’s skipped cutting down the nets. The players instead held the trophy after the No.
item.dc:creator: LARRY FLEISHER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Commanders acquire wide receiver Deebo Samuel in a trade with the 49ers, AP source says
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The Washington Commanders have acquired wide receiver Deebo Samuel from the San Francisco 49ers for a fifth-round pick, pending a physical, according to a person with knowledge of the trade.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: No. 4 Houston clinches Big 12 regular-season title with 73-64 win over Cincinnati
item.description: HOUSTON (AP) — L.J. Cryer scored 20 points and No. 4 Houston clinched the outright Big 12 regular-season title for a second straight season with a 73-64 win over Cincinnati on Saturday. Terrance Arceneaux added 10 points for Houston (25-4, 17-1 Big 12), which has won eight straight.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Women athletes don't compete vs. transgender in Team USA track event, giving default victory to trans athlete
item.description: Transgender athlete Sadie Schreiner took first place in the USATF Open Masters Championship in the women's 400-meter dash when the other competitors did not participate.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Utes beat BYU on half-court overtime buzzer-beater
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utes women's basketball team ended the regular season with a bang. Matyson Wilke hit a half-court shot at the buzzer as the Utes avoided a major upset against BYU Saturday afternoon at the Huntsman Center, 76-73.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Lee Kunzman, 'persistent' Indy 500 veteran, dies at 80
item.description: Kunzman's best finish in his INDYCAR SERIES career was in 1979, when he placed second at Atlanta Motor Speedway. It was just a narrow loss to winner Johnny Rutherford, IMS officials said.
item.dc:creator: Cooper Hudson, Fox 5

item.title: Washington Capitals to honor DCA plane crash victims with helmet decal
item.description: The Washington Capitals and Tampa Bay Lightning will honor the victims of the DCA plane crash, one month to the day of the horrific accident.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Travis Hunter says his two-way stardom is more impressive than Shohei Ohtani’s
item.description: Colorado star Travis Hunter said it is more difficult to play two ways in football than what Shohei Ohtani is going in baseball.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Petition to recall Maine governor, opposed to Trump's trans sports order, gets 22,000 signees ahead of protest
item.description: Over 22,000 people have signed an online petition to recall Maine governor Janet Mills, who has loudly opposed President Donald Trump's transgenders-in-sports executive order.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump says he will pardon Pete Rose, delivers scathing statement to MLB on his Hall of Fame candidacy
item.description: President Donald Trump said on Friday he will be signing a pardon for Pete Rose, who died in September before ever seeing himself inducted into the Hall of Fame.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bountiful 3-peats with another 5A state title
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Bountiful girls basketball team has built a true dynasty. The Redhawks knocked off previously undefeated West High to win its third straight state championship Friday night at the Huntsman Center, 57-47.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Bears prospects to watch at the NFL Scouting Combine: Tight ends and defensive backs
item.description: At the NFL Scouting Combine, defensive backs and tight ends are going through drills at Lucas Oil Stadium, with prospects like Gunnar Helm, Harold Fannin Jr., Malaki Starks, Sebastian Castro, and Kevin Winston Jr. showcasing their skills and potential to contribute to NFL teams.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Boys Basketball: St. Augustine 62, Sage Creek 39
item.description: Lead by PPR Gala Awards Special Teams Player of the Year Pai Polamalu, the Saintsmen handily beat the Bobcats 62-39 to advance to the D1 finals against Victory Christian Academy.
item.dc:creator: Bri Savant, Fox 5

item.title: Boys Basketball: Carlsbad 73, Cathedral 61
item.description:
Carlsbad basketball had a repeat on its mind: a goal to get back to the Open Division title game.
Consider it mission accomplished after a 73 to 61 win over a hard charging Cathedral team.
Jett Kenady was the difference for the Lancers on Tuesday night, scoring 24 points. Jake Hall added 22.
item.dc:creator: Brandon Stone, Fox 5

item.title: Guenther scores game-winner in 2-1 victory over Vancouver
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Dylan Guenther scored the tiebreaking goal with 5:53 left in regulation, and the Utah Hockey Club defeated the Vancouver Canucks 2-1 at Delta Center on Sunday. Guenther scored on the power play by tipping in a backdoor pass from Nick Schmaltz at the left post.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Luxury portable toilets sought after ahead of NFL draft
item.description: The luxury restroom trailers and containers feature flushing toilets, sinks, air conditioning, and even stereo systems.
item.dc:creator: Timothy Littau, NewsNation
